scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node proxy.js"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend" "node proxy.js"
